name: Lindsey Shearman
profileSummary: Senior Artworker responsible for preparing and delivering leaflets, point-of-sale (POS) materials, and high-profile client projects to print on a daily basis. Possesses a strong understanding of print processes and production requirements. Also Lead on our Lago system, which is a Multichannel marketing and product information management (PIM) software system, designed to help retailers, manufacturers, and agencies centralize data for marketing, and produce content for both print (catalogs, circulars) and digital (e-commerce, web) channels.
